name: CSOAI Compliance Agent
description: Multi-region AI safety compliance verification, crosswalk mapping, and SIGIL certificate attestation. Layer 0 infrastructure for the global AI governance ecosystem.

skills.name: EU AI Act Compliance Audit
skills.description: Full EU AI Act compliance assessment with risk classification, gap analysis, and remediation roadmap.
examples: Audit my AI system for EU AI Act compliance
Classify my system under EU AI Act risk tiers

skills.name: Framework Crosswalk Mapping
skills.description: Map compliance requirements between frameworks (EU AI Act, NIST, ISO 42001, TC260, etc.)
examples: Map EU AI Act Art 9 to NIST RMF
Show me gaps between ISO 42001 and EU AI Act

skills.name: SIGIL Certificate Verification
skills.description: Verify CSOAI SIGIL certificates using Ed25519 signatures and blockchain anchoring.
examples: Check if my SIGIL digest is valid

skills.name: DOME Global Status
skills.description: Query the CSOAI DOME global compliance command center for real-time status across all regions.
examples: How many open violations are there?

skills.name: BFT Council Governance
skills.description: Participate in Byzantine Fault Tolerant council voting for cross-regional compliance decisions.

authentication.description: Request an API key at https://csoai.org/comply

contact.organization: CSOAI LTD (trading as MEOK AI Labs)
